summary: Add conversation-agent and memory control-plane persistence.
rationale: This slice connects the outer conversation agent, memory services, Workbench routes, and runtime-control lineage so user clarification and human intervention can safely pause, reopen, and continue workflow runs from durable SQLite state.
deletion_targets: conversation state that only exists in transient process memory
human intervention context that cannot be linked back to runtime-control runs
memory usage records that are not tied to the local product control plane
risks: Conversation-agent state must remain product control state, not raw prompt or provider payload storage.
Human intervention lineage must be idempotent when a runtime process is restarted.
Memory retention and privacy erasure must keep recruiter-visible state separate from developer/debug artifacts.
